items.claim: Patty Pimblett does not train consistently and gains significant weight between camps.
items.quote: Patty barely trains. Like he gets so fat out of camps.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett uses performance-enhancing drugs to achieve his physique.
items.quote: There's never been a more blatant use.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett has better explosive, big-man takedowns than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: I think Patty has better big man explosive slam type takedowns

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has superior technical cage wrestling compared to Patty Pimblett.
items.quote: I think his technical cage wrestling is so much better than Patty's.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett hits harder and has bigger punches than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: I think standing Patty probably hits harder. He's got bigger punches

items.claim: Patty Pimblett lacks technical boxing ability.
items.quote: he is like he's not good.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a tendency to get tired in fights.
items.quote: And Benois does get tired. He does get a little sleepy

items.claim: Patty Pimblett's grappling is overrated and relies on 'Hail Mary' attempts.
items.quote: I think Patty's grappling is so overrated. He's a very Hail Mary type guy.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett is effective at taking the back during grappling scrambles.
